description: CompositionCream coloured round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest printFittingComfortWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery The Mudras are an integral part of Indian culture from the days of yore. India is always identified for its performing arts and this t-shirt is an acknowledgement of that. Flaunt the rich cultural heritage of India with this tantra t-shirt. Team it with jeans and sandals for that cool look, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2', Chest-39.5", Waist-32"
